linting.notes: Primary linting via golangci-lint with extensive configuration including gocritic, goheader, govet, gci, ginkgolinter, perfsprint, revive, and others. Run via 'make ci-lint' or 'make verify' for full verification.

testing.framework: Ginkgo/Gomega for integration and e2e tests, gotestsum for unit tests
testing.test_directory: test/ (integration, e2e, performance subdirectories) and *_test.go files throughout pkg/
testing.mock_patterns: Uses envtest for simulated Kubernetes API server in integration tests
testing.notes: 227 test files found. Unit tests via 'make test' or 'go test ./pkg/...'. Integration tests via 'make test-integration' (requires envtest setup). E2E tests via 'make test-e2e' (requires Kind cluster). Performance tests available. Tests use Ginkgo BDD framework with parallel execution support.

ci.notes: This is an ODH fork of kubernetes-sigs/kueue. The GitHub workflows present are ODH-specific for image building and publishing to quay.io/opendatahub. The upstream kueue project has extensive CI (unit tests, integration tests, e2e tests across multiple k8s versions) but those workflows are not present in this fork. Based on commit history, this fork carries ODH-specific patches on top of upstream releases.

build.notes: Go 1.24.0 required (specified in go.mod). Build produces bin/manager binary. Multiple build targets: 'make build' for main controller, 'make kueuectl' for CLI tool, 'make image-build' for container images. CGO_ENABLED=0 by default for static linking.

conventions.test_naming: Go standard test naming (TestXxx functions) and Ginkgo BDD style (Describe/It/Context blocks)
conventions.import_style: gci enforces import grouping: standard library, third-party, sigs.k8s.io/kueue prefix, blank imports, dot imports
conventions.notes: Code requires Apache 2.0 license header (enforced by goheader linter). Uses controller-gen for code generation. Follows Kubernetes coding conventions. Tests organized by component: singlecluster, multikueue, e2e, performance.

lint_commands.notes: Linter ran successfully and found 1 legitimate issue (unused function)

test_commands.notes: All unit tests passed successfully (87 packages tested, 0 failures)

container_recipe.notes: Container validation successful with golang:1.24.0 base image. All basic validation commands work without additional configuration. Integration and e2e tests require additional setup (envtest, kind cluster) and were not validated in container. Build produces 108MB binary.

results.notes: Linter found 1 legitimate issue (unused function) - command works correctly

E2E tests require Kind cluster and external CRDs (jobset, kubeflow, ray-operator, etc.)
Performance tests require specific setup and were not validated
